calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 29, 2014 is admitted to probate. Liana T. Figone is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for January 13, 2025 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.
